title: Chapter 107
content:
Chapter 107: My Footwork Isn’t Deep Enough! I Fight the Alien Robot Legion

"Don’t give up! You have to survive too! Are you okay with this? I’ll jerk off to a loli if I have to! If you’re really this kid’s mother, don’t just hand her future over to me!"

「...!」

"You’ve been raising Mirai inside this ship the whole time, right? She’s precious to you, right? Is it really okay to leave her alone with me in an escape pod? On the planet I came from, it’s probably around midnight right now. Prime masturbation time! Every guy gets randomly hard at this hour! If I get an erection, I’ll use this kid to relieve myself!"

"That is exactly what I hope for. Mirai’s growth has been slowed, so she looks like a little girl, but she is over 1,000 years old — a perfectly legal loli. Her body is that of a child, but she has been modified so she can become pregnant. My wish is... for Mirai to give birth to and raise children, so that new life may continue into the future. Even if our civilization ends, we can still leave behind hope for the future."

"You’re spouting some pretty convincing bullshit! You dense idiot! Wind Pressure Masturbation!"

WHOOSH!

I forcibly erected my dick using wind pressure stimulation on my crotch.

"Look! This is my reproductive organ! This is the true form of the dick you mistakenly thought was small! Look at this kid’s pussy through the light beams!"

「...!」

"If I put my dick inside such a tiny pussy, it won’t end with just an injury. Her life would be in danger! So don’t give up! You have to protect Mirai!"

"I...?"

"This is a huge ship. There must be at least one or two female androids in storage, right? Transfer your consciousness into one of them!"

"There are none."

"Then make one with your super technology! You’ve been fighting for 10,000 years! You had plenty of time. Why didn’t you make one?!"

"Our resources were evenly matched with the enemy’s. Anything not used for combat—"

"Stop making excuses! If you scan my memories, you’ll find perfect reference material for one or two humanoid androids. Use that and build one right now!"

"But we don’t have the time—"

"I’ll buy you time. I’m an unpredictable combat asset that suddenly appeared. I’ll fight the enemy. While I do that, you focus on surviving and protecting Mirai!"

I placed the little girl down at the bottom of the capsule.

"You will protect this child by becoming a female android! I’ll fight outside until my magic runs out. Guide me outside!"

"But..."

"Hurry up! It’ll be too late!"

"...Understood."

I relied on my memory and started running back the way I came.

Soon, what looked like guide lights appeared and began leading me.

"Please defend this ship for 20 minutes. That will give me enough time to create a humanoid android."

"Got it. I’ll fight with everything I’ve got until you finish building a super mecha girl with strong mechanical elements — one that uses biological parts only for the breasts and crotch, with exposed mechanical joints covered in skin-like material in places, who normally looks like a human girl but can transform into a humanoid mobile weapon by deploying weapons and flight units whenever needed!"

"Um... Please give me one hour..."

"Make it 30 minutes!"

"E-ehh..."

30 minutes, huh... This is going to be a tough fight.

I only have enough magic left for one or two uses of Darkness Fire. I’ll need to use it efficiently. Maybe I should use Wind Pressure Masturbation to close in and fight in melee?

"Ah."

After running for a while, a silver semi-transparent membrane appeared in front of me.

"What’s this? It wasn’t here when I came in."

"Please proceed straight through without stopping."

"Got it!"

I trusted the ship (what was its name again? Durang... whatever) and went through.

"Durangradasil."

"Sorry. I’ll remember it. Ah—"

The moment I passed through the membrane, my body was covered in a silver, full-body tights-like suit that glowed. A helmet-like structure also formed around my face.

"This will allow you to perform extra-vehicular activity."

"Amazing."

"You can breathe for up to 3 hours. You will be able to stand on surfaces where you think there should be a floor. Any urination, defecation, or ejaculation will be absorbed by the suit, converted into energy, and returned to your body during respiration."

"Everything except that last function is perfect!"

But actually, I really needed to piss, so I decided to test it right away.

It had been quite a while since I last peed before going to sleep, and I was reaching my limit.

Pissing while running — first time in my life.

"Haa... uu..."

For a brief moment, warm liquid came out inside the suit. Because my crotch got splashed with liquid while still "clothed," it felt strangely good, like a wet dream.

But it was instantly absorbed. Not even a drop remained! I could piss as much as I wanted!

"Amazing. Masaharu’s pee disappeared."

"See? Pretty cool, right? ...Huh?"

I heard a normal voice talking to me, and when I looked beside me — Lucia was there.

She was wearing the white outfit she sometimes wore.

Was I seeing a hallucination at the edge of the universe?

When I stopped, Lucia stopped too.

"Lucia?"

"What?"

I poked her nipple. Not a hallucination. She was really here.

Lucia made finger guns with both hands and poked my nipples back quite hard.

"Hyaa! Eh? Why? Lucia, how are you here?"

"Because you told me to help if you wet yourself."

"Eh?"

...Ah!

It was when I was thrown out into space!

『Yeah. Lucia. Throw me straight up into the sky.』

『Eh?』

『If you throw me at an angle I’ll fly off somewhere, so throw me straight up. Then catch me when I fall back down.』

『Isn’t that dangerous?』

『Yeah, I know it’s risky. If I lose consciousness from fear or piss myself, help me.』

『Got it.』

Yeah... I really did tell her to help if I wet myself.

"No, but still, gods are really something. You can instantly appear even this far across the universe."

"I’m a god, so I can do pretty much anything?"

"I see."

While I was rejoicing over my reunion with Lucia, Durangradasil spoke up, sounding confused even though she was a machine.

"Masaharu. A lifeform has suddenly appeared. What exactly is...?"

"Ah— She’s a Dragon God."

DOOOOOOOOOOON!

"Uwah!"

The shaking was intense. I couldn’t stay on my feet.

I fell, but Lucia caught me against her flat chest.

Her chest absorbed zero impact!

"I helped you, and you’re thinking rude things again..."

"Sorry. More importantly, this space battleship is under attack. Can you take out the mobile weapons around us?"

"Space battleship? Mobile weapons?"

Ah, right. Even though she’s a Dragon God, she probably doesn’t know sci-fi stuff. When we first met she didn’t even know about erections or masturbation.

"A god who governs the future, civilization, and science and technology told me I’m not allowed to know about those things, so I can’t perceive or understand ’space battleships’ or ’mobile weapons.’"

"I see..."

Must be some divine regulation. Troublesome...

"Then can you sense large objects about ten times the size of a human moving around nearby?"

"I can’t. I’m not allowed to know about them, so I can’t perceive them."

"Alright... Then take me outside."

"Got it."

Pop.

In the blink of an eye, I was floating in space with Lucia.

"Lucia, transform into a dragon."

"Nn."

DOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOSH!

Lucia’s body glowed, and in an instant she turned into a massive dragon. She was so huge that her entire form didn’t fit in my field of view. Since there was nothing in front of me, I was probably riding on her head.

If Lucia couldn’t perceive the enemies, I would become her eyes.

Around us, I could occasionally see thruster flames from enemy mobile weapons.

The enemy seemed to have been forced to change tactics due to Lucia’s sudden appearance, and their movements became erratic.

But they quickly regained coordination. What looked like beam weapons stretched out, and Durangradasil’s barrier flashed blue for a moment.

Good. Even though it was a high-speed battle in space, I could somehow follow it with my dynamic vision.

"Lucia. Attack in the direction I point."

"Got it."

"Let’s go! Set! Sacred—

Flash

!"

"?"

"Ah, um, when I say ’Sacred Flash,’ I want you to attack in the direction I’m pointing."

"Understood."

"Just to check — if you attack with full power, could you destroy a planet?"

"Yeah. Easily."

"That’s way too strong..."

If the power was too high, even Durangradasil might get caught in it.

"Oh, right. Can you do a Sacred Flash that only damages enemies within 7 squares?"

"7 squares?"

"About the length of 7 of your bodies."

"Got it."

"I’ll give detailed instructions, so read my thoughts!"

"Understood."

"Here they come! Right front, advance!"

"Okay. Going nya, Masaharu!"

"Go! Sacred Flllaaaaash!!"

SHIIIIIIIIIIIIIIN!

A pale blue-white light spread out in all directions from Dragon Lucia’s body.

I felt nothing when the light touched me, but explosions bloomed one after another around us.

However, space was vast after all. With a 7-square range, we couldn’t take out even half the enemies.

...!

They got above us. An enemy mobile weapon armed with a laser blade was diving down.

"My footwork isn’t deep enough!"

I abandoned the chant and fired Darkness Gravity.

GYUINGYUN, BUUUUUUUUUUUUUN.

It didn’t destroy the enemy, but it forced them to change direction and pass by the side of Lucia.

Good. I’ll leave offense to Lucia and focus on defense.

"Do a flip and return to the original direction. Good. Second Sacred Flash, 3, 2, 1, now!"

SHIIIIIIIIIIIIIIN!

Pale blue-white light spread out from Dragon Lucia, followed by explosions.

Because Lucia was reading my thoughts and vision, our coordination was perfect.

After several more minutes of battle, we destroyed every single enemy mobile weapon.

Thus, the 10,000-year war between the Galactic Planetary Union and the opposing faction finally came to an end.
